response.justification: Candidate is highly experienced (Staff/Senior level with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and AI tooling) and technically strong in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS — well above the required skills bar. However, the role is explicitly entry/junior-to-mid level with high on-site presence required, while the candidate is based in Lagos, Nigeria and operates at Staff Engineer seniority. Significant mismatch on seniority, likely compensation expectations, and location/on-site requirement make this a poor structural fit despite excellent technical credentials.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience plus AWS CDK and Kubernetes exposure
Track record with relational and NoSQL databases, REST/GraphQL APIs, and clean architecture (TDD, trunk-based dev)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work aligns with LLM nice-to-haves
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying for a junior/mid IC role
Location (Lagos, Nigeria) conflicts with high on-site presence requirement
Only basic German and no obvious renewable-energy/construction-tech domain background
